sourcesContent:
// src/pages/SolutionsPage.js import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './SolutionsPage.css'; const SolutionsPage = () => { const solutions = [ { id: 'guardian', name: 'Guardian Care', icon: '🛡️', color: '#4f2f7c', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%)', tagline: 'Major Medical & Emergency Cover', description: 'Comprehensive coverage for major medical events, emergencies, advanced imaging, private hospitalisation, surgery, cancer treatment, and international evacuations.', features: [ 'Emergency Services 24/7', 'Advanced Imaging (MRI, CT Scan)', 'Private Hospitalisation', 'Major Surgery Coverage', 'Cancer Treatment', 'International Evacuations', 'Specialist Consultations' ], price: 'From $89/month', link: '/register' }, { id: 'access', name: 'Access Care', icon: '🚪', color: '#2c3e50', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #3498db 0%, #2c3e50 100%)', tagline: 'Essential Healthcare Cover', description: 'Emergency services, hospital admissions, consultations with doctors and specialists, diagnostic imaging, and outpatient treatment for acute illnesses.', features: [ 'Emergency Services', 'Hospital Admissions', 'Doctor Consultations', 'Specialist Visits', 'Diagnostic Imaging', 'Outpatient Treatment', 'Pathology Services' ], price: 'From $47/month', link: '/register' }, { id: 'vantage', name: 'Vantage Care', icon: '⭐', color: '#27ae60', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #27ae60 0%, #2ecc71 100%)', tagline: 'Comprehensive Wellness Cover', description: 'Management of chronic conditions, maternity care, dental services, optical equipment, wellness programs, and preventative care services.', features: [ 'Chronic Condition Management', 'Maternity & Prenatal Care', 'Dental Services', 'Optical Equipment', 'Wellness Programs', 'Preventative Care', 'Mental Health Support' ], price: 'From $140/month', link: '/register' } ]; const additionalServices = [ { name: 'iGo Wellness', icon: '🏃', description: 'Personalized wellness programs and health tracking', link: '/igo' }, { name: 'MedLabs', icon: '🔬', description: 'Comprehensive laboratory and diagnostic services', link: '/labs' }, { name: 'Dental Care', icon: '🦷', description: 'Full dental services including orthodontics', link: '/dental' }, { name: 'Optometry', icon: '👓', description: 'Eye examinations and optical equipment', link: '/optical' }, { name: 'Dialysis', icon: '💉', description: 'Specialized renal care and dialysis services', link: '/dialysis' }, { name: 'Pharmacies', icon: '💊', description: 'Convenient prescription services', link: '/pharmacy' }, { name: 'Rescue Services', icon: '🚑', description: '24/7 emergency medical rescue', link: '/rescue' }, { name: 'Cimas Care', icon: '❤️', description: 'Comprehensive primary healthcare', link: '/cimas-care' }, { name: 'Telemedicine', icon: '💻', description: 'Virtual consultations with doctors', link: '/telemedicine' }, { name: 'Mental Health', icon: '🧠', description: 'Psychological and psychiatric support', link: '/mental-health' }, { name: 'Physiotherapy', icon: '🦵', description: 'Rehabilitation and physical therapy', link: '/physiotherapy' }, { name: 'Nutrition', icon: '🥗', description: 'Dietary planning and nutrition advice', link: '/nutrition' } ]; const scrollToServices = () => { const servicesSection = document.getElementById('services-section'); if (servicesSection) { servicesSection.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); } }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

  • ✓ {feature}

))}
{/* Additional Services Section */}

{service.icon}

{service.name}

{service.description}

))}

Join thousands of satisfied members who trust our healthcare solutions

Get Started Today
); }; export default SolutionsPage;
